title: Lipoedema - NHS
text:

Causes of lipoedema 
The exact cause of lipoedema is not clear.
It's not caused by being overweight – you can be a healthy weight and still get it.
It may be caused by changes in your hormones:
during puberty when you're pregnant when you're going through the menopause when you're taking the contraceptive pill Sometimes lipoedema runs in families.
